prompt: Create a new tag 'quick-wins' nested under my existing 'chores' tag, then put it on the dry-cleaning to-do.
paraphrases: Add a child tag quick-wins beneath chores and apply it to 'Drop off the dry cleaning'.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTag c JOIN TMTag p ON c.parent=p.uuid WHERE c.title='quick-wins' AND p.title='chores'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTask t ON tt.tasks=t.uuid JOIN TMTag g ON tt.tags=g.uuid WHERE t.title='Drop off the dry cleaning' AND g.title='quick-wins'

pseudoScript: things todo tags "$(things search "Drop off the dry cleaning" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --add quick-wins
